title: Tu Khara Mun Chhai
subTitle: Manini aspires to become an actor, but is married off to Abhimanyu, a wealthy man. While they strive to cope with their different personalities, the couple also attempts to manage multiple relations.

title: Kichi Sata Kichi Micha
subTitle: Siblings Chhabi and Chaaya, grief-stricken and seeking vengeance, embark on a journey of retribution. Chhabi's quest to bring down the Mangaraj clan conflicts with her growing feelings for Alok.

title: Suna Jhia
subTitle: A determined young woman with great aspirations must undergo the various challenges thrown at her on the path to fulfil her dreams.

title: Tuma Bina
subTitle: Lakshmi, an orphan, is chosen as a temporary bride for Akshay to counter a flaw in his horoscope. However, as Akshay falls in love with her, he is faced with a decision that could alter their futures.
